National Storage Mechanism | Additional information
RNS Number : 1071D
On the Beach Group PLC
05 September 2024
 

5 September 2024

 

 

On the Beach Group plc

("Company")

 

PDMR Transaction

 

The Company announces that it has been notified that on 4 September 2024 Adam Hansen, Chief Strategy Officer, transferred 16,104 ordinary shares of 1 pence each in the Company ("Ordinary Shares") held by him to an individual savings account ("ISA") held in his name. This transfer was effected by the sale of 16,104 Ordinary Shares at a price of £1.496 per Ordinary Share and the repurchase of 16,104 Ordinary Shares at a price of £1.498 per Ordinary Share.

   

The Notification of Dealing Form required in accordance with UK MAR is set out below.

Adam Hansen
